productDisplayName: Murcia Women Non Leather Brown Bag
description: Composition:Leatherette bag with floral patternBag careRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Use a mild leather cleanerThis compact murcia handbag comes in brown metallic shades with a retro floral pattern on the body. The handle is supplemented by a steel ring for extra structure. The body has a bow resembling a butterfly to tie together the outdoorsy theme. Team this bag up with simple whites or blacks for an evening out.
